subject: Razoul — a large, stocky humanoid figure in a red and purple guard uniform with a tall hat charging forward aggressively, holding what appears to be a blade
description: A large, powerfully built humanoid figure dressed in a red and purple guard's uniform with a tall white hat charges directly toward the viewer with a menacing snarl. The figure's arms are wide and forward-reaching, and a short blade or implement is visible in one hand. The background is a rich purple and magenta with swirling glowing energy patterns, suggesting a mystical or palace interior setting. The composition places the figure centrally in an aggressive forward lunge, low-angle perspective amplifying the sense of menace. Rendered in bold animated Disney style.
foreground: large stocky guard in red and purple uniform lunging forward with blade
background: swirling purple and magenta glowing energy patterns
